{{Quote|I won't be your trophy, dead or as a slave.|translated=1|Chorrawl to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Chorrawl''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] hunter who lived during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. When he first met an amnesiac [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who came to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in search of a [[Star Map]], he misjudged the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] as just another [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka]] slaver because he was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]. Later, Revan retrieved the blade of the great [[Bacca]]'s [[Bacca's Ceremonial Blade|sword]] and gave it to ex-[[Chief/Legends|chieftain]] [[Freyyr]], who had been exiled by [[Chuundar]], Freyyr's son. When Freyyr came back to [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]] with this important artifact to challenge Chuundar, Chorrawl sided with Freyyr. He helped to overthrow Chuundar and return Freyyr to his rightful place as chieftain.
